checks.description: allowedTools contains Bash with no command restrictions
checks.reason: Unrestricted Bash access lets the agent run any shell command.
checks.fix: Replace 'Bash' with scoped entries like 'Bash(git status)' or use an allowlist.

checks.reason: Wildcard Bash is equivalent to giving the agent unrestricted root shell access.
checks.fix: Remove Bash(*). Specify exact commands the agent is allowed to run.

checks.reason: Disables all permission checks — any tool call is permitted.
checks.fix: Set dangerouslyAllowAll to false and enumerate only needed tools.

checks.description: No autoApprove restrictions — all tool calls auto-approved
checks.reason: Large autoApprove lists skip human review for sensitive operations.
checks.fix: Reduce autoApprove to read-only tools. Gate write/execute tools manually.

checks.description: model not pinned — uses default (may change without notice)
checks.reason: Unpinned model means behavior can change when provider updates default.
checks.fix: Pin to a specific model ID, e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6'.

checks.reason: Cursor rules instructing the agent to run arbitrary terminal commands are high risk.
checks.fix: Scope terminal instructions to specific, named commands only.

checks.description: Copilot instructions include shell execution directives
checks.reason: Copilot instructions that direct shell execution bypass normal approval flow.
checks.fix: Remove shell execution directives from copilot-instructions.md.
